description: Kasius announces the arena fight between Ben and May, pitching May as an 'Agent of S.H.I.E.L.D.' Both fight for their lives, Ben using his telepathic skills, while Fitz and Kasius negotiate and evaluate the fighters. Fitz cleverly manipulates the outcome by suggesting May be sent to the surface rather than killed in the ring.

transcript.line: It is refreshing to have a man of your caliber join our ranks. Would you care to join me for the upcoming display?
I'm eager to see everyone you have to offer.
Then I shall make every effort not to disappoint. Our first contestant possesses extraordinary skill, a telepath, able to read his opponent's plan of attack before it is carried out.

Normally, I'd pit Ben against another Inhuman. Yet, for this select crowd, I've decided for a more unique opponent. One not of this time. This deadly assassin was trained by one of the galaxy's most despised organizations. But most intriguing, she is also a friend to the Destroyer of Worlds. Dear guests, may I present to you, Melinda May, Agent of S.H.I.E.L.D.
Aah! You're cheating.
And you're dying.
How many traveled in time with the Destroyer?
My servant and Melinda May are the only ones I've discovered, though Sinara remains convinced there are more.
The mind reader's a skilled fighter. Speaks well of his training.
Ben is quite talented for an Inhuman. But he wouldn't last a day in my father's army.
You speak highly of your father.
He's the greatest warrior I know.
Ponarian made it seem as if you'd been banished from your home world.
Ponarian knows not of what he speaks.
My father was disapproving. The things I did to earn his respect, they left scars.
My own situation, it is a tragic misunderstanding.
No one can help you now. Not even a guest of Kasius.
Aah!
You're doubting yourself.
Stay out of my head.
My guess is you're selling the Destroyer as a way to redeem yourself.
I believe a great fortune can smooth over any transgression.
I'm prepared to help you with that.
Don't make me the bad guy. Kasius only tossed me in here because I helped your friends.
Okay. Then I won't kill you.
Thanks for promising not to do something you can't...
Didn't think, just did. Aah! Aah! We have to work together.
What is it with you guys and teamwork?! This fight needs to end now, or else they'll feed us both to the Roaches on the surface.
Aah!
No way. Kasius isn't gonna change the rules now.
You just have to know who to ask.
This fight bores me.
I assure you it will end in a most thrilling fashion. Sinara, have the guards throw in more weapons.
Lack of weapons is not the problem. I came to see the Destroyer fight, not some ancient has-been.
I'm afraid a life is owed.
